title: Dock Pressure Choice
intendedTensionBeat: The urgent route and the safest dock stabilizer compete for action order.
intendedReleaseBeat: A disciplined stabilizing clear makes the urgent rescue feel earned rather than delayed.
expectedPath: Take one costly rescue clear, immediately stabilize dock with a triple, then finish the urgent target.
expectedFailMode: Player either overprotects dock and loses water tempo, or overcommits to rescue clears and overflows.
designNotes: The ice tile is a small future-value read on the route, not a new teaching beat.
